# FX01 — Orthogonal-Surfaces Fixture Epic (PASS)

Synthetic single-story epic exercising the orthogonal-surfaces carve-out for the
epic-reviewer agent's AC mutual satisfiability check (E05.S6 AC1, Review Dimension #7).

## Story FX01.S1 — Add provenance footer to two unrelated docs

**Goal:** Append a one-line provenance footer to two unrelated documentation files.

**ACs:**

1. `docs/fixtures/alpha.md` ends with a footer line matching the literal string
   `Generated by FX01.S1` immediately before EOF. Only the final line of `alpha.md`
   is modified; the body section "## Alpha Body" is untouched.

2. `docs/fixtures/beta.md` ends with a footer line matching the literal string
   `Generated by FX01.S1` immediately before EOF. Only the final line of `beta.md`
   is modified; the body section "## Beta Body" is untouched.

**Notes:** The two ACs operate on disjoint files (`alpha.md` vs `beta.md`) and on
disjoint prose regions within their respective files (final-line footers, not body
sections). The orthogonal-surfaces carve-out applies — no joint state exists that
could make both ACs simultaneously unsatisfiable.
